bead.title: Phase 2: post-redesign UX, ops, topology, autonomy
bead.description: Umbrella epic for the 17-story batch following the 2026-05 redesign. Each sub-epic corresponds to one user story with its plan at /tmp/story-N-final.md. Locked decisions baked in: Story 4 fold strategy moot (predecessor closed; successor bead needed); Story 8 Sessions tab keeps AgentSession as backing store; Story 10 keeps --no-review as break-glass with required ack flag; Story 15 full agent toolkit for operator prompts.
bead.acceptance: All 17 sub-epics closed. Drain completes without unresolved review BLOCKs. ddx doc audit passes on any new specs/research artifacts. Locked decisions honored.
